setup.headline: Review the product snapshot, then run locally for real audits.

modes.label: Personal live
modes.detail: Available after cloning and running locally.

checks.label: Public preview
checks.detail: This deployment is a read-only product snapshot.

checks.label: Personal live runtime
checks.detail: Run AutoCore locally when you want to audit your own projects.

providers.detail: Groq is optional. Add your own key when you want model critique or provider quota signals.

next_steps.label: Review the snapshot
next_steps.detail: Open Lab, Audit, Runs, and Evidence to see what AutoCore proves.

next_steps.label: Use it on your own project
next_steps.detail: Clone the repo and run npm run start:live plus npm run dev.
